reviews.comment:
Hermoso lugar totalmente recomendable y como siempre el Rider Guillo (sos un grande Panessi)y su señora Sandra punto de referencia de Puerto Madrin

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful place, highly recommended, and as always, Rider Guillo (you're great, Panessi) and his wife Sandra are a landmark in Puerto Madryn.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMTlpX21BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estancion de servicio en medio de la meseta Chubutense, calidad de atencion muy buena comidas cafeteria muy surtido el kiosco almacen full.  Lugar ideal pequeño descando con sombra y buen servicio

(Translated by Google)
Service station in the middle of the Chubut plateau, excellent service, very good food, well-stocked cafeteria, and a fully stocked convenience store. An ideal little place to rest in the shade with good service.

reviews.comment:
Esta muy buena,  más si venis cansada viajando, un buen lugar para parar, nosotros viajámos en moto y pudimos armar la carpa y pasar la noche.

(Translated by Google)
This is really good, especially if you're tired from traveling, a good place to stop. We were traveling by motorcycle and were able to set up our tent and spend the night.
